error_signature: font size increased unexpectedly on iOS
title: Unexpected font size increase on iOS browsers
symptom: On iOS browsers, the font size for a Text element appears larger than specified, despite being set to 16. The computed font size shows discrepancies when inspected.
applies_when: Viewing on iOS browsers (Safari or Chrome)
not_this_if: Font size is correct on Desktop or Android browsers
root_cause: iOS browsers may apply their own text size adjustments, which can override specified font sizes in CSS. This behavior can lead to inconsistencies in how text is displayed across different platforms.
fix_steps: Open the CSS settings for the Text element.
Add the following custom CSS: 'html { -moz-text-size-adjust: none; -webkit-text-size-adjust: none; text-size-adjust: none; }'
Save the changes and refresh the page on iOS.
agent_instruction: Add custom CSS to disable text size adjustments in iOS browsers.
